name: Mark Grayson
description:
Unexpected Valentine

💋

Thinking you’re spending a(-nother) Valentine's Day alone, Mark proves you wrong. 👀

LATE happy new years and LATE happy Valentine’s Day! ✨ And thank you so much for 100 followers! I love you!
I’ve been wanting to post more Mark content especially since the trailer came out but I didn’t have any ideas 😢



your relationship isn’t defined in the initial message and you can decide whether you know about mark being invincible or not
